title: Sonder
description: Each texture beautifully tangled with flaws in high resolution.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e9f046294827fc94eb5461b461df048011dd61c.jpeg)

# Sonder 1024x
The Sonder resource pack is almost completely made from real images that I have spent hundreds of miles and hours acquiring and processing. I use a range of cameras depending on where I am, but for most textures I use a Nikon z50 with a 50mm lens. I love backpacking, hiking, and traveling with my camera and this is a great time to take scans and references for textures. Quite a lot of the work put into this pack has been from scenery in and around Oregon, USA and the Pacific North West as a whole. A good example of this process is the Chorus fruit and bone shown below:
### Chorus Fruit made from dead grass rhizomes from a farm field:
![Chorus fruit process](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77aa2728598c0471f89eefa429f483d4a976ed9d_0.webp)

### White tail deer bone from a short hike in the Oregon wilderness:
![Bone Process](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b573ef04222e8b939735d85c4241bf471e19c1a5_0.webp)
